data.title: What's Going On With Palantir Stock Premarket On Monday?
data.description: S&P Dow Jones Indices announced on Friday that Palantir will join the S&P 100 index. Also, Voyager deepens collaboration with  Palantir for AI-powered space solutions. Aims to accelerate deployment by 2026.

data.title: China Hits Its Largest US Import, Soybeans, With Tariffs Along With Other Agricultural Products: Here's A List Of Stocks, ETFs That Could Be Impacted
data.description: China has retaliated with tariffs on U.S. agricultural imports, specifically Soybeans. Many related businesses are likely to be impacted.

data.title: How To Earn $500 A Month From Kohl's Stock Ahead Of Q4 Earnings
Rocket Companies, Novo Nordisk And Other Big Stocks Moving Lower In Monday's Pre-Market Session
US Shale Industry Can Deliver Trump's Pledge For 'Drill, Baby, Drill' Despite Falling Prices, Says Energy Secretary: 'The Economics Of Shale Don't Work,' Says Expert
data.description: The US shale sector is capable of ramping up oil production even if prices fall to $50 per barrel, according to U.S. Energy Secretary, Chris Wright.
